templates.focus: wide cross-file consistency: does the change break anything elsewhere, is there duplicated logic across files, are there dependency or type conflicts. Use the large context to scan widely.
deep local scan of the listed files: logic errors, edge-case failures, bugs, and each checklist item. Go deep, not wide.
frontend layout and rendering bugs in the listed files: broken responsive behavior, visual regressions, accessibility issues.
deep code-level review of the listed files: logic errors, edge-case failures, security issues, async/concurrency bugs, and best-practice violations. Report each with file, line, and severity.
